exception.message:
Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\Quality Analyst 3\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s emulator-5554 shell 'settings delete global hidden_api_policy_pre_p_apps;settings delete global hidden_api_policy_p_apps;settings delete global hidden_api_policy'' exited with code 224'; Command output: cmd: Failure calling service settings: Broken pipe (32) cmd: Failure calling service settings: Broken pipe (32) cmd: Failure calling service settings: Broken pipe (32)
Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-U8O7OSH', ip: '192.168.68.106' Build info: version: '4.11.0', revision: '040bc5406b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[{appium:newCommandTimeout=120, appium:deviceName=LAVA LXX518 API 36.0, platformName=ANDROID, appium:automationName=UIAutomator2, appium:app=C:\Users\Quality Analyst 3\Downloads\Softwares\appium-workspace\calculator\src\test\java\resources\Calculator_buttons.apk}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:app: C:\Users\Quality Analyst 3\..., appium:automationName: UIAutomator2, appium:deviceName: LAVA LXX518 API 36.0, appium:newCommandTimeout: 120, platformName: ANDROID}}] Capabilities {appium:app: C:\Users\Quality Analyst 3\..., appium:automationName: UIAutomator2, appium:deviceName: LAVA LXX518 API 36.0, appium:newCommandTimeout: 120, platformName: ANDROID}

exception.message:
Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec.
